title: lithotoma axillaris
intro: Lithotoma axillaris, also known as the "stone-breaking plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat kidney stones and gallstones due to its litholytic properties, which help break down and dissolve stones in the body. The health benefits of Lithotoma axillaris include relief from pain and discomfort associated with kidney stones, as well as improved digestion and reduced risk of further stone formation. Lithotoma axillaris is often prepared as a tea or infusion for internal use, or as a poultice for topical application, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
